name: Rox
role: Baby Shower · May 23, 2026 · 60 guests · Lawrence MA

handling.tone: Possibly younger Latina, single nickname only. Lawrence MA heavily Hispanic (Dominican-American largest in NE). Apr 24 Portuguese SMS may have hit close, but likely English-preferred.
handling.voice_adjustments: Andre voice: urgency-aware, brief, English-first with light Spanish if it lands. Last name capture is step 1.
handling.context: Inbound Apr 15 from FB Lead Form. Baby shower 4 weeks out (HIGH URGENCY). 60 guests, mid-size. $2,079 ballpark. No engagement after Day-1 push. No last name captured.

context_anchors: Baby shower May 23 — 4 weeks out, HIGH urgency
No last name — pull from Close

lead.source: FB Lead Form — VIDEO RODS WEDDING & FACELESS
lead.next_move: Urgency-aware re-engagement giving fast path: text/email/call binary + last name + venue

enrichment.identity_notes: Single name only — could be nickname (Roxanne, Roxana, Roxy) or stage/handle. Lawrence demographics + single-name presentation suggests younger Latina with social media presence under 'Rox'.
win_angles: Latin cultural fit possible — ask, don't assume
60 guests + 4 weeks = mid-tier, drop-off+attendant most likely
Baby shower energy — celebrate the mom-to-be, brunch/lunch timing
Day 1 was thorough but no engagement — re-engage with urgency
nepq_openers: Continuation: 'Hi Rox — quick check on May 23 baby shower. ~4 weeks to go. Two questions: (1) date locked at May 23? (2) best way to send a quick proposal — text, email, 10-min call? You're tight on calendar so I want to be useful fast.'
Frame: 'Whose baby shower? Want to make sure I help make HER day feel special.'
Anchor: 'For 60 baby shower 4 weeks out: drop-off ($X), light buffet ($Y), full hosted ($Z). Tight proposal in 24h if you tell me direction.'
open_gaps: Mocktail focus typical for baby showers
enrichment.strategic_note: Tight clock + missing personal info + cultural nuance unaddressed. One urgency-aware re-engagement giving fast binary, gets last name + venue. If she comes back, move fast — propose, quote, close in days. If no response by 5/1, accept the loss.

comms.summary: Day-4 cadence — sent in PORTUGUESE (likely misfire)

notes: 4-week clock real — fast win or accept loss
